title: AdversarialMatrix
description: Output of the Registrar Agent. Maps both parties' arguments issue-by-issue into a neutral matrix for human review before the Judge Agent runs.

undisputed_background.description: Facts agreed upon by both parties or not contested.

framed_issues.description: Each legal issue framed neutrally, with both parties' stances mapped against it.

issue_id.description: Unique identifier e.g. I-1, I-2. Used by Judge Agent to iterate.

neutral_issue_statement.description: The issue stated without favouring either party.

human_review_status.description: Gate field. Judge Agent must not run unless this is 'approved'.
